recalls.Description: Grundens is recalling the Youth Clipper 282 Jacket and Youth Zenith 282 Jacket, available in youth sizes 8 to 12. These jackets feature a drawstring in the hood and display the "Grundens" logo on the left chest. The Clipper jacket is available in orange, while the Zenith jacket comes in orange, navy, and camouflage. Each jacket has a black label inside, indicating the brand and country of origin.
recalls.Title: Grundens Recalls Youth Jackets Due to Strangulation Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, contact Grundens at 800-323-7327 from 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. PT Monday through Thursday, and 8 a.m. to 12 p.m. on Friday. You can also email recall@Grundens.com or visit https://grundens.com/pages/recall for more details.

Products.Name: Youth Clipper 282 Jacket
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 8,850 (In addition, about 730 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: "Grundens" is printed on the label inside the jacket

Retailers.Name: Available at Bass Pro Shops and various outdoor retailers nationwide, as well as on Grundens.com from August 2015 to August 2025, priced between $55 and $120.

Hazards.Name: Strangulation hazard from drawstring in the hood

Remedies.Name: Remove drawstrings and return for a full refund or receive a 20% discount code by submitting a photo of the jacket without the drawstring

recalls.metaDescription: Grundens recalls Youth Clipper and Zenith jackets due to a strangulation hazard. Learn how to participate in the recall for a refund or store credit.

recalls.Description: AFTCO is recalling its Youth Solitude Rain Jackets, available in youth sizes XS to L. These jackets are made from waterproof nylon and feature a retractable drawstring in the hood, prominently displaying the AFTCO logo. The internal label includes the company's logo, size, care instructions, fiber content, and country of origin. The model number for these jackets is BJ05, and they come in sizes XS (5-6), S (6-7), M (8-10), and L (10-12).
recalls.Title: AFTCO Recalls Youth Solitude Rain Jackets Due to Strangulation Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For further assistance, consumers can reach AFTCO at 877-489-4278 from 7 a.m. to 3:30 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or via email at recall@aftco.com. More information is available online at www.aftco.com/recall or by visiting www.aftco.com and selecting the "Recall" section.

Images.Caption: The label inside of the recalled AFTCO Youth Solitude Jacket

Retailers.Name: Available online at www.aftco.com and at various fishing, camping, and outdoor equipment retailers across the country from November 2018 through August 2024, priced between $80 and $100.

Importers.Name: AFTCO Mfg. Co., of Santa Ana, California

Hazards.Name: Strangulation hazard due to the drawstring in the hood, which can catch on objects, posing a risk of death or serious injury to children.

Remedies.Name: Consumers should immediately remove the drawstrings from the jackets to eliminate the risk. They can return the jackets to AFTCO for a full refund or submit a photo of the jacket without the drawstring to receive a $25 gift card. Participation details can be found at www.aftco.com/recall. AFTCO is reaching out to all known purchasers.

recalls.metaDescription: AFTCO recalls Youth Solitude Rain Jackets due to a strangulation hazard. Immediate action is required for consumer safety.

recalls.Description: TravisMathew has issued a recall for adult women's half-zip sweatshirts and both men's and women's hoodies due to a serious burn hazard. The affected items include various styles and colors, such as women's Chance Encounter and Save the Day Half-Zip Sweatshirts, as well as men's Cloud and In the Rain Hoodies. These garments, available in sizes S to XXL, feature labels indicating 'TRAVISMATHEW', the size, and 'MADE IN PERU'. The side-seam labels provide additional details including fiber content and care instructions.
recalls.Title: TravisMathew Recalls Women's Sweatshirts and Men's and Women's Hoodies Due to Burn Hazard
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, consumers can reach TravisMathew at 877-969-1952 from 9 a.m. to 5 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, or via email at info@travismathew.com. More information is available online at https://www.travismathew.com/recallnotice or by visiting www.travismathew.com and selecting 'Recall Information' under Customer Support.

Images.Caption: Recalled Women's Chance Encounter Half-Zip Sweatshirts in Heather Copen Blue and Heather Mauve Shadows
Recalled Women's Save the Day Half-Zip Sweatshirts in Heather Natural and Heather Winetasting
Recalled Women's Off Script Zip-Up Hoodies in Heather Light Gray and Heather Crown Blue
Recalled Men's Black Cloud Hoodie with "Los Angeles Dodgers" Logo
Recalled Men's Heather Gray Cloud Hoodie with "New York Yankees" Logo
Recalled Men's Heather Gray Cloud Hoodie with "Boston Red Sox" Logo
Recalled Men's Heather Gray Cloud Hoodie with "Chicago Cubs" Logo
Recalled Men's Black and Heather Gray Cloud Hoodies with "University of Southern California" Logo
Recalled Men's Cloud Hoodie 2.0s in Black, Moonbeam, Dark Olive, Ash Blue, and Mood Indigo
Recalled Men's Abject Lesson Hoodies in Black and Heather Gray with "Corona" Logo

Retailers.Name: Available at TravisMathew and various independent clothing and golf course retailers nationwide, as well as online at TravisMathew.com from January 2024 through October 2024, priced between $130 and $180.

Importers.Name: TravisMathew LLC, of Huntington Beach, California

Hazards.Name: Burn hazard due to violation of federal flammability standards

Remedies.Name: Full refund or store credit upon returning the recalled garments

recalls.metaDescription: TravisMathew recalls women's sweatshirts and men's and women's hoodies due to burn hazards. Contact for refunds and safety information.
